output: Completed batch 2 for `T3`. task_updates.executor_notes: Wired `uploadVideoGeneration` through `useExternalDrop` into `handleFileDrop`, and inserted the video branch immediately after the image branch and before the generic `uploadAsset` fallback. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` and `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.test.tsx`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: The new `isVideoFile` branch sits directly after the existing `isImageFile` branch and directly before the generic `uploadAsset` path, so image uploads keep their current behavior and only video files take the generation-backed route.
